title: Escándalo de estrellas
writer: Ramiro Gómez Kemp, Arturo Manrique, José Peña
actors: Pedro Infante, Blanquita Amaro, Florencio Castelló
plot: Ricardo wants to become and actor against his father's wishes who would rather see him as a lawyer. Ricardo gets a part in a movie that is being sabotaged and for which he is wrongly accused. He chooses to defend himself at trial ...
